zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Brudenell於1420年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安時，他的父親Henry Brudenell28歲，母親Eleanor Preston24歲。他於1435年之前與Agnes Depden在英國巴金哈姆爾巴金哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1469年8月1日之前在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安 煙雨 可爾希爾，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Brudenell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: ethnic name from Old Norman French Bretonnel, a diminutive of Bret ‘Breton’.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Brudenell was born in 1420, in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Brudenell, was 28 and his mother, Eleanor Preston, was 24. He married Agnes Depden before 1435, in Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died before 1 August 1469, in Amersham with Coleshill, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Brudenell est né en 1420, à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Brudenell, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Preston, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Depden avant 1435, à Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 1 août 1469, à Amersham with Coleshill, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Brudenell 1420 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Brudenell 28 und seine Mutter Eleanor Preston 24. Er hat vor 1435 in Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England Agnes Depden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1. August 1469 in Amersham with Coleshill, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Agnes Depden prima del 1435, nel Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1 agosto 1469, nel Amersham with Coleshill, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Brudenellが1420年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムで生まれた時，父Henry Brudenellは28歳，母Eleanor Prestonは24歳であった。1435年以前にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアブクインガムでAgnes Depdenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1469年8月1日以前にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャム ウィス コーレシュイルで死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.Amersham with Coleshill, Buckinghamshire: 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 어머샤 위스 콜레시
ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Brudenell(이)가 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 어머샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Brudenell(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Preston(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1435년 이전 영국 벅잉함실르 벅잉함에서 Agnes Depden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1469년 8월 1일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 어머샤 위스 콜레시에서 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 어머샤에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Agnes Depden antes 1435, em Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Brudenell родился в 1420 г. в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Brudenell было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Preston, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Depden перед 1435 г. в местности буккингхам, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер перед 1 августа 1469 г. в местности амиршам вит колешилл, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия.
